channel.title: PLoRA on Camille's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in PLoRA on Camille's Blog

item.title: Focus on the model InternLM_XComposer2 & 4KHD
item.description: Test of the model body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; } input, textarea, button { width: 100%; margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 10px; } #result { margin-top: 20px; white-space: pre-wrap; } .highlight-button { border: 1px solid black; background-color: red; color: black; width: auto; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 5px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s; margin-top: 30px; } .highlight-button:hover { background-color: #ff6666; /* Rouge plus clair pour la surbrillance */ color: black; } hr.
